_comment: The ONE file the experiment agent edits. One experiment = one knob set. The bot, hedger, and risk code are fixed infra; you change conditions here, run a bounded experiment, score it, keep or revert. See program.md. These knobs map onto the bot config / find-pairs filters when you apply them to a run.
_metric: Optimize the score from `npm run cross-market-mm:score` (higher is better). It rewards: every fill hedged, book stays flat, some real fills, little bleed, low peak inventory, no manual rescue.

pair_filters.prefer: same-day match-winner (resolves in hours, quotes don't go stale)
